hero.description: Through strategic retail activations and data-driven marketing solutions, we help Swiss brands achieve exceptional growth and market presence.

fr.description: Grâce à des activations retail stratégiques et des solutions marketing basées sur les données, nous aidons les marques suisses à atteindre une croissance exceptionnelle et une présence sur le marché.

de.description: Durch strategische Retail-Aktivierungen und datengesteuerte Marketinglösungen helfen wir Schweizer Marken, aussergewöhnliches Wachstum und Marktpräsenz zu erreichen.

it.description: Attraverso attivazioni retail strategiche e soluzioni di marketing basate sui dati, aiutiamo i brand svizzeri a raggiungere una crescita eccezionale e una presenza sul mercato.

about.title: Our Success
about.description: Discover the key factors that drive our success in retail marketing and brand activations across Switzerland.

factors.title: In-House Development
factors.description: RetailDashboard.io is our own trade marketing software suite. Developed in cooperation with our customers, ready for your projects.

factors.title: Products & Sales Training
factors.description: Combined with a unique bonus system for sales promoters, we thus guarantee optimal sales consultations and correctly set incentives for the highest customer benefit.

factors.title: Big Data vs. Smart Data
factors.description: Updated daily, available at any time.

factors.title: Optimal route planning
factors.description: Which store should be visited and how often? What has strategic relevance? Switzerland has 4 national languages?! We know the answers and are happy to help out.

factors.title: Last Minute Logistics
factors.description: On over 500m2 near the city we are prepared for (almost) everything. Use our own online warehouse & ordering solution and have everything delivered to your home at the touch of a button.

factors.title: Stationary Trade vs. E-commerce
factors.description: The core topic in retail. Experience our multichannel solutions up close.

fr.title: Notre Succès
fr.description: Découvrez les facteurs clés qui motivent notre succès dans le marketing retail et les activations de marque à travers la Suisse.

de.title: Unsere Erfolgs
de.description: Entdecken Sie die Schlüsselfaktoren, die unseren Erfolg im Retail-Marketing und bei Markenaktivierungen in der Schweiz antreiben.

it.description: Scopri i fattori chiave che guidano il nostro successo nel marketing retail e nelle attivazioni di marca in tutta la Svizzera.
